task_completion.description: Verify that a fiducial marker named 'liver' (case-insensitive) has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fiducial point in the 2D/3D views or the Markups module list with a name containing 'liver'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'liver' marker is accurately placed on the liver anatomy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the axial/sagittal/coronal views. The 'liver' marker should be located on the large organ on the patient's right side (left side of the screen in standard axial radiological view).

task_completion.description: Verify that a fiducial marker named 'spine' (case-insensitive) has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fiducial point in the 2D/3D views or the Markups module list with a name containing 'spine'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'spine' marker is accurately placed on the vertebral column.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the image slices. The 'spine' marker should be located on the bright, bony vertebral column at the posterior (bottom of the screen in axial view).

task_completion.description: Verify that a fiducial marker named 'heart' (case-insensitive) has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fiducial point in the 2D/3D views or the Markups module list with a name containing 'heart'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'heart' marker is accurately placed on the heart anatomy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the image slices. The 'heart' marker should be located on the heart, which is visible in the superior (upper) slices of the scan in the thoracic cavity.

task_completion.description: Verify that the markups are saved to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save Data' dialog box or terminal/Python console output showing the markups node being saved to '~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/orientation_markers.mrk.json'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the 3D Slicer GUI to place the fiducials.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for mouse clicks on the fiducial placement tool and interactions within the 2D slice viewers or 3D view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actively scrolled through the CT slices to locate the correct anatomical structures.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for changes in the slice views (axial, sagittal, or coronal) indicating the agent was searching for the liver, spine, and heart before placing markers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent exported the markups from Slicer rather than forging the JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Slicer 'Save Data' window being used to write the .mrk.json file, rather than a text editor or echo command in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In the AMOS 2022 dataset, the liver is identified by label ID 6. The liver is typically the large organ on the right side of the patient's abdomen (left side of the image in standard axial radiological convention).
